summary: Gruber posts a brief housekeeping note for Daring Fireball members about two common issues with the membership system. Gmail users may find their confirmation emails caught in spam filters. Returning members who renewed need to update their RSS subscription passwords to use their new membership key. He provides specific instructions for updating credentials in NetNewsWire and Safari/Keychain Access.
key_points: Gmail spam filters were catching Daring Fireball membership confirmation emails
Renewed memberships require manually updating RSS feed passwords with the new membership key
Instructions provided for NetNewsWire and Safari/Keychain Access password updates
money_quotes: If you've signed up but haven't received your membership information, please check your spam box.
key_insight: A brief administrative note addressing common friction points in Daring Fireball's early membership and paid RSS feed system.
